input.command:
cd /d/mybot && python -c "
import json
d = json.load(open('.claude/settings.local.json', encoding='utf-8'))
h = d['hooks']
print('top-level keys preserved:', list(d.keys()))
print('permissions.allow entries:', len(d['permissions']['allow']))
print('hook events:', list(h.keys()))
ups = h['UserPromptSubmit'][0]['hooks'][0]
ptu = h['PostToolUse'][0]
stop = h['Stop'][0]['hooks'][0]
assert ups['command

SID="2e3aafce-65f5-45a1-8488-7a83a6e73825"
echo "=== audit dir ==="; ls -la /d/mybot/handover/audit/ 2>/dev/null
echo "=== this session's trail? ==="
if [ -f "/d/mybot/handover/audit/$SID.jsonl" ]; then wc -l < "/d/mybot/handover/audit/$SID.jsonl"; tail -3 "/d/mybot/handover/audit/$SID.jsonl"; else echo "NOT YET CREATED - hooks not live in this session"; fi
input.description: Check whether hooks fired this session

curl -s -u "$USER:$TOKEN" -G "$JK/job/REACTOR_SPARK_FW_UPDATER_WIN_OSX/32/api/json"

cd /c/Users/alice/.claude/projects/D--mybot/memory

python -c "
import re, pathlib
idx = pathlib.Path('MEMORY.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8')
linked = set(re.findall(r'\]\((\w+)\.md\)', idx))
onDisk = {p.stem for p in pathlib.Path('.').glob('*.md') if p.stem != 'MEMORY'}
print('links in index :', len(linked))
print('files on disk  :', len(onDisk))
missing = onDis
input.description: Verify no memory links lost in compaction
